title: FIRST PLACE FAMILY CENTER - 211info
text: FIRST PLACE FAMILY CENTER FIRST PLACE FAMILY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a day center with laundry, showers, internet access, mail services, clothing vouchers, on-site clothing, and hygiene supplies. Assistance in obtaining identification documents. 4060 W Amazon Drive Eugene, OR 97405 Eligibility: Families with children under age 18 and pregnant women (proof of pregnancy required) who are experiencing homelessness Hours: 7 days per week 9am-5pm (541) 342-7728 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 342-7728 Main phone Main phone (541) 342-7728 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information, pre-screening is required. Intake takes 45-60 minutes. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: 7 days per week 9am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on LTD bus routes 24, 28, and 36. Services: Clothing Vouchers * Homeless Families Clothing Vouchers * Pregnant Individuals Community Voicemail * Homeless Families Community Voicemail * Pregnant Individuals General Clothing Provision * Homeless Families General Clothing Provision * Pregnant Individuals Homeless Drop In Centers * Homeless Families Homeless Drop In Centers * Pregnant Individuals Laundry Facilities * Homeless Families Laundry Facilities * Pregnant Individuals Personal/Grooming Supplies * Homeless Families Personal/Grooming Supplies * Pregnant Individuals Public Internet Access Sites * Homeless Families Public Showers/Baths * Homeless Families Public Showers/Baths * Pregnant Individuals Records/Licenses/Permits Fee Payment Assistance * Homeless Families Records/Licenses/Permits Fee Payment Assistance * Pregnant Individuals Telephone Facilities * Homeless Families Telephone Facilities * Pregnant Individuals Temporary Mailing Address * Homeless Families Temporary Mailing Address * Pregnant Individuals Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - LANE COUNTY COORDINATED ENTRY ACCESS POINTS HOUSING/SHELTER - NIGHT SHELTER ANNEX HOUSING/SHELTER - OVERNIGHT PARKING PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
